name: Ready to Go Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1-2 tablespoons of milk as needed. If you like frosted cake, keep a supply of frosting in the refrigerator to easily spread on slightly warm cake.
2. Directions: Microwave (High) margarine in an uncovered bowl for 20 to 30 seconds or until softened.
3. Blend in powdered sugar and cocoa. Add milk just until the mixture reaches a spreading consistency. Beat well.
4. Blend in vanilla extract.
5. Transfer frosting to a sealable plastic storage bag. Store in the refrigerator until ready to use.
6. To warm frosting slightly, microwave (with twist-tie removed) for 10 to 15 seconds.
7. To use, cut off the small corner of the bag and squeeze the desired amount of frosting onto slightly warm cake.
8. Carefully spread with the back of a spoon.
9. Between uses, fasten the opening closed with a twist tie.
Approximately 1 cup of frosting is available for use.
Variations: For vanilla frosting, omit cocoa. For almond or maple-flavored frosting, substitute 1/2 teaspoon almond extract or 1/4 teaspoon maple flavoring for vanilla.
Note: Frosting can also be stored in a covered plastic container. After microwaving to warm slightly, stir until creamy and spreadable.
